ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "sub_product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-product type */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main issue */,
  "sub_issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-issue */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the complaint was submitted */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* ZIP code where the complaint was submitted */,
  "submitted_via" TEXT /* Channel through which the complaint was submitted (e.g., Web, Phone) */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the complaint was received */,
  "date_sent_to_company" TEXT /* Date the complaint was sent to the company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company handling the complaint */,
  "company_response" TEXT /* Response provided by the company */,
  "timely_response" TEXT /* Whether the company responded in a timely manner */,
  "consumer_disputed" TEXT /* Whether the consumer disputed the company's response */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the consumer who submitted the complaint */,
  "consumer_description" TEXT /* Consumer's description of the issue */,
  "company_response_date" TEXT /* Date when the company responded to the complaint */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution provided by the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_submitted_via FOREIGN KEY ("submitted_via") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_method"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_sub_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_issue_id") REFERENCES sub_issues ("sub_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_sub_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_product_id") REFERENCES sub_products ("sub_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_company_response FOREIGN KEY ("company_response") REFERENCES responses ("response_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_consumer_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumer_id") REFERENCES consumer_information ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_products" (
  "sub_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "sub_product_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-product */,
  "sub_product_category" TEXT /* Category of the sub-product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the main issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the main issue */,
  "issue_category" TEXT /* Category of the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_issues" (
  "sub_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-issue */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main issue */,
  "sub_issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-issue */,
  "sub_issue_category" TEXT /* Category of the sub-issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission method */,
  "submission_method" TEXT /* Name of the submission method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the submission method */,
  "submission_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the complaint was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response type */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response type */,
  "response_category" TEXT /* Category of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_information" (
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Consumer's full name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Consumer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Consumer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Consumer's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_history" (
  "complaint_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint history */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the complaint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_history_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each representative */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Representative's full name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Representative's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Representative's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_representatives_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
